name: freeze
tagline: Restricts file edits to a specified directory for the session, blocking Edit/Write operations outside the boundary.
verdict: This skill effectively restricts file edits to a user-defined directory, enhancing focus during debugging or scoped changes. It clearly defines its purpose, setup, and how it works, including limitations. The use of hooks for enforcement and clear instructions for activation/deactivation are strong points. It includes good versioning and clear descriptions.
